$comment: sharedcorelib security policy for THIS app. See publisher-ci/README.md.

source.$ignoreComment: src/tax/schemas holds static JSON-Schema definitions for offline ITR-export parsing; their only http:// strings are the canonical draft-04 dialect identifier (an opaque ID, never network-fetched). JSON cannot carry an inline publisher-ci-ignore comment, so the dir is allowlisted here. No network/crypto code lives there.
